response.justification: Strong generalist software engineer with 15+ years across web, backend, embedded, and full-stack work, plus recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq. However, the resume shows limited explicit production GenAI experience — no demonstrated work with vector databases, RAG architectures, LLM evaluation pipelines, or multi-agent frameworks like LangGraph/CrewAI. Cloud experience is limited to AWS CDK at Optilyz. Could be a fit if the recent AI-agent work at re:cinq is substantive, but the role specifically requires 8+ years of AI-driven solution development, which is not evidenced here.
strengths: 15+ years of polyglot engineering across TypeScript, Node.js, Python-adjacent stacks, and low-latency systems
Recent hands-on work with MCP servers and agentic workflow tooling at re:cinq
Proven technical leadership: workshops, talks, mentoring, founding an open-source platform
concerns: No demonstrated experience with vector databases, RAG, or LLM evaluation/observability pipelines
Limited cloud breadth — primarily AWS CDK; no GCP or Azure evidence
Does not meet 8+ years of AI-driven solution development; GenAI exposure appears recent and shallow

key_factors.factor: Strong full-stack and systems engineering depth
Recent MCP and agentic tooling exposure
